channel.title: #Iso Layout · keyboard wire
channel.description: All keyboard wire entries tagged Iso Layout.

item.title: User requests help identifying unknown laptop keyboard layout
item.description: Request for help identifying an unknown laptop keyboard layout. — 1 pts · 2 comments · r/KeyboardLayouts

item.title: Self designed ISO MX PCB to fit Holy80
item.description: Small couple-designed ISO PCB that uses QMK — notable because it’s a custom ISO PCB + full RGB and shows a DIY ISO QMK build that others may reuse. — 21 pts · 5 comments · r/MechanicalKeyboards
